landing_join_modal_opened.description: Track when a visitor opens the landing join modal from a call to action.
landing_join_modal_opened.trigger: Fire after a landing page CTA opens the membership request modal.

trigger_source.description: Stable identifier for the CTA that opened the modal.

landing_join_form_submit_attempted.description: Track when a visitor submits the landing join form.
landing_join_form_submit_attempted.trigger: Fire on the client before the landing join form server action runs.

form_id.description: Stable identifier for the submitted form.

lead_source.description: Stable source identifier associated with the lead pipeline.

landing_join_form_submit_succeeded.description: Track when the landing join form completes successfully.
landing_join_form_submit_succeeded.trigger: Fire after the landing join form server action returns a success state.

form_id.description: Stable identifier for the submitted form.

lead_source.description: Stable source identifier associated with the lead pipeline.

landing_join_form_submit_failed.description: Track when the landing join form returns an error state.
landing_join_form_submit_failed.trigger: Fire after the landing join form server action returns an error state.

form_id.description: Stable identifier for the submitted form.

lead_source.description: Stable source identifier associated with the lead pipeline.

failure_reason.description: Coarse non-PII failure category for analytics reporting.

field_error_count.description: Number of fields with validation or duplicate-entry errors.
